text: Kira, kullanıcının (kiracı) bir varlığın kullanımı karşılığında sahibine (kiralayan) ödeme yapmasını gerektiren sözleşmeye dayalı bir düzenlemedir.
validation_reason: Nugget, kira tanımını orijinal metinden doğru bir şekilde çevirmiştir.
storage_reason: This nugget provides a clear and concise definition of a lease, which is fundamental to understanding the topic. It is well-supported and has high importance.

text: Kira sözleşmesi, kiralayan (varlığın yasal sahibi) ve kiracı (varlığı kullanma hakkını düzenli kira ödemeleri karşılığında elde eden) arasında yapılan ve uygulanabilir yargı yetkisinin sözleşme hukuku kapsamında tüm taraflarca yasal olarak uygulanabilen bir sözleşmedir.
validation_reason: Nugget, kira sözleşmesinin taraflarını, haklarını ve yasal uygulanabilirliğini orijinal metinden doğru bir şekilde özetlemektedir.
storage_reason: This nugget elaborates on the lease agreement by defining the parties involved (lessor and lessee), their roles, and the legal enforceability of the contract. It is well-supported and has high importance.

text: Kira sözleşmesi, mülk sahibinin isteği üzerine feshedilebilen bir lisanstan farklıdır; temel fark, kira sözleşmesinin genellikle belirli bir bitiş tarihi ve süresi boyunca düzenli periyodik ödemeler ve belirli bir bitiş tarihi içermesidir.
validation_reason: The chunk explicitly contrasts a lease with a license, stating that a license is "subject to termination at the will of the owner". It also highlights the "seminal difference" as a lease providing "regular periodic payments during its term and a specific ending date".
storage_reason: This nugget clearly distinguishes a lease from a license, highlighting key differences such as fixed end dates and periodic payments, which is valuable for understanding the nuances of lease agreements. It is well-supported and has high importance.

text: Kira sözleşmesi, kiralayan (varlığın yasal sahibi) ve kiracı (varlığı kullanma hakkını düzenli kira ödemeleri karşılığında elde eden) arasında yapılan ve yerel yasa gereği hükümler içeren, tüm taraflarca yasal olarak uygulanabilen bir sözleşmedir.
validation_reason: The chunk describes the roles of lessor (owner) and lessee (tenant) and the exchange of payment for use. It also mentions "specific provisions regarding the responsibilities and rights of the lessee and lessor, or there will be automatic provisions as a result of local law", which implies legal enforceability of the contract.
storage_reason: This nugget is very similar to ng_52adf591b092. It reiterates the parties involved and legal enforceability, adding that local law may provide specific provisions. Merging it with ng_52adf591b092 would create a more comprehensive definition of a lease agreement.

text: İstenilen zamanda kira sözleşmesi (tenancy at will), ev sahibi veya kiracının makul bir bildirimle herhangi bir zamanda feshedebileceği bir kiracılıktır.
validation_reason: The nugget accurately translates and reflects the information in the original chunk: 'A tenancy at will is a tenancy which either the landlord or the tenant may terminate at any time by giving reasonable notice. Unlike a periodic tenancy, it isn't associated with a time period.'
storage_reason: This nugget defines 'tenancy at will' and its key characteristic: termination by either party with reasonable notice. This is a specific type of leasehold and is important for a comprehensive understanding. It is well-supported and has high importance.

text: İstenilen zamanda kira sözleşmesi (tenancy at will), kiracının mülke zarar vermesi, kiracılığı devretmeye çalışması, mülkü suç teşkil eden bir işletme için kullanması, ev sahibinin mülkteki menfaatini devretmesi, ev sahibinin mülkü başka bir kişiye kiralaması veya kiracı ya da ev sahibinin ölmesi durumunda yasa gereği sona erer.
validation_reason: The nugget accurately translates and reflects the information in the original chunk: 'A tenancy at will is broken, again by operation of law, if the: Tenant commits waste against the property; Tenant attempts to assign the tenancy; Tenant uses the property to operate a criminal enterprise; Landlord transfers his/her interest in the property; Landlord leases the property to another person; Tenant or landlord dies.'
storage_reason: This nugget details the specific conditions under which a 'tenancy at will' is terminated by operation of law. This provides crucial detail about the limitations and legal aspects of this type of lease. It is well-supported and has high importance.

text: İstenilen zamanda kira sözleşmesi (tenancy at will), tarafların istediği sürece devam eden ve herhangi bir tarafça cezasız bir şekilde feshedilebilen bir kiracılıktır.
validation_reason: The chunk states 'A tenancy at will lasts only as long as the parties wish it to, and may be terminated by either party without penalty' and 'Subject to any notice required by law, a tenancy at will also comes to an end when either the landlord or the tenant acts inconsistently with a tenancy', which supports the nugget's claims about termination without penalty, not being for a specific period, and requiring notice.
storage_reason: This nugget overlaps significantly with ng_5a3280bf0551 and ng_aad5e211fb7d. It reiterates that tenancy at will lasts as long as parties wish and can be terminated without penalty. Merging the core concept of termination with the other nuggets would be beneficial.

text: Zorunlu kiracılık (tenancy at sufferance) veya elde tutma kiracılığı (holdover tenancy), bir kiracının kira süresi sona erdikten sonra mülkü elinde tutmaya devam ettiği ve ev sahibinin kiracıyı mülkten çıkarmak için harekete geçene kadar var olan bir durumdur.
validation_reason: The chunk states: 'A tenancy at sufferance (sometimes called a holdover tenancy) exists when a tenant remains in possession of a property after the expiration of a lease, and until the landlord acts to eject the tenant from the property.'
storage_reason: This nugget defines 'tenancy at sufferance' or 'holdover tenancy', explaining that it occurs when a tenant stays after the lease expires until the landlord takes action. This is a distinct and important concept. It is well-supported and has high importance.

text: Bir yıldan uzun süreli kiracılıklar, Dolandırıcılık Yasası'nı (Statute of Frauds) karşılamak için yazılı olmak zorundadır.
validation_reason: The chunk states: 'A tenancy for a duration greater than one year must be in writing in order to satisfy the Statute of Frauds.'
storage_reason: This nugget states a legal requirement for leases longer than one year to be in writing to satisfy the Statute of Frauds. This is a crucial legal detail for leases. It is well-supported and has high importance.

text: Kira, bazı ortak hukuk yargı bölgelerinde kira sözleşmeleri için bir gerekliliktir, ancak medeni hukuk yargı bölgelerinde değildir; sembolik bir kira bile yeterlidir.
validation_reason: The chunk explicitly states: 'Rent is a requirement of leases in some common law jurisdictions, but not in civil law jurisdictions.' It also mentions 'the court will more often construe a licence where no rent is paid' and 'a peppercorn or rent of some nominal amount is sufficient for this requirement'.
storage_reason: This nugget explains the requirement of rent for leases in different legal jurisdictions (common law vs. civil law) and the sufficiency of nominal rent. This is an important detail about the nature of rent in leases. It is well-supported and has high importance.

text: Mülkün münhasır zilyetliği, bir kira sözleşmesi için yaygın bir gerekliliktir, ancak yorumu yargı bölgelerine göre değişir; bir paylaşım düzenlemesi bir kira sözleşmesi olarak kabul edilmesini engelleyebilir.
validation_reason: The chunk explicitly states: 'A sharing arrangement with much of a landlord's property... may defeat a finding of a lease, however this common requirement of a lease is interpreted differently in many jurisdictions.'
storage_reason: This nugget discusses the common requirement of exclusive possession for a lease and how sharing arrangements can affect this classification, noting jurisdictional variations. This is a key aspect of lease agreements. It is well-supported and has high importance.

text: Kiracı mülkün zilyetliğine sahiptir ve ev sahibi, uygun bildirim ve yetki olmaksızın giriş yaparsa kiracının haklarını ihlal etmiş olur.
validation_reason: This nugget is a direct translation of the sentence: 'A renter is in possession of the property, and a landlord would be trespassing upon the renter's rights if entry is made without proper notice and authority (e.g., 24 hours' notice, daytime, knock first, except for emergency repairs, in case of fire, flood, etc.).'

text: Uzun süreli bir kira sözleşmesini süresi dolmadan bırakmak, cezalarla veya hatta anlaşılan tüm dönemin maliyetiyle sonuçlanabilir.
validation_reason: This nugget is a direct translation of the sentence: 'Leaving a long-term lease before its expiration could result in penalties, or even the cost of the entire agreed period (if the landlord is unable to find a suitable replacement tenant, after diligent pursuit).'

text: Birçok yerde, bir mahkeme tahliye kararı olmaksızın kapı kilitlerini değiştirmek, kişisel eşyaları çıkarmak veya bir kişiyi zorla çıkarmak tamamen yasa dışıdır.

text: Depozito genellikle kiracıya ait olup, mülk iyi durumda teslim edilene kadar ev sahibi tarafından tutulan bir emanet depozitosu olarak işlenir ve bazı eyaletlerde yıllık faiz ödemesi veya hasar listesi sunulması gerekebilir.
